steps.title: Check the coefficient
steps.content: The equation $6x+5=17$ is linear, and the coefficient of $x$ is $6$, which is not $0$.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content:
A linear equation with a nonzero coefficient has exactly one solution. Solving confirms this:
$$6x+5=17$$
$$6x=12$$
$$x=2$$
The answer is A.
